d: Cyran selects a tile and summons a black hole that lasts for [[5]]s, with its center covering a 1-tile radius. Every 0.25s, enemies within the center take [[16%]]<ATK> damage, and those outside the center but within 4 tiles take [[6%]]<ATK> damage. All enemies on the battlefield are pulled toward the center, with the gravitational force increasing as they get closer. Enemies within the center are immediately defeated if their current HP is below Cyran's [[600%]]<ATK> and their HP ratio is under [[15%]].
Increases the black hole's damage to enemies within the center to [[17%]]<ATK> per 0.25s, and to enemies at the edges to [[7%]]<ATK> per second.
Increases the black hole's damage to enemies within the center to [[18%]]<ATK> per 0.25s, and to enemies at the edges to [[8%]]<ATK> per second.
Increases the black hole's damage to enemies within the center to [[19%]]<ATK> per 0.25s, and to enemies at the edges to [[9%]]<ATK> per second.
Increases the black hole's damage to enemies within the center to [[20%]]<ATK> per 0.25s, and to enemies at the edges to [[10%]]<ATK> per second.
Cyran casts 3 magic orbs towards the area with the most enemies, dealing [[65%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies.
Increases damage to [[70%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[75%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[80%]]<ATK>.

Cyran uses magic to lift the nearest enemy into the air, imprisoning them for [[1]]s before hurling them into the area with the most enemies. This knocks the target down for [[0.5]]s and deals [[150%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within 1 tile of the target. When casting this skill, Cyran prioritizes targeting an enemy who is neither [[unaffected]] nor [[steadfast]].
Increases damage to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[170%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[180%]]<ATK>.
When in battle, Cyran increases his Crit by [[18]], and after defeating an enemy with Gravitic Requiem, his Crit is further increased by [[12]].
When in battle, Cyran increases his Crit by [[24]], and after defeating an enemy with Gravitic Requiem, his Crit is further increased by [[16]].
When in battle, Cyran increases his Crit by [[30]], and after defeating an enemy with Gravitic Requiem, his Crit is further increased by [[20]].

Cyran mimics some of Merlin's impressive spells, casting them in the following sequence when a battle starts:
Enlightening Spell: Grants himself [[30]] Haste for [[8]]s, during which he is [[unaffected]].
Confining Spell: Deals [[25%]]<ATK> damage to the [[rearmost]] enemy, imprisoning them for [[1.5]]s and preventing them from moving or acting.
Starshard Spell: Conjures a dark flame across the battlefield, dealing [[40%]]<ATK> true damage to all enemies and reducing their ATK SPD by [[20]] for [[5]]s.
Increases dark flame damage to [[45%]]<ATK>.

If Merlin is present on the enemy side, Merlin is silenced for [[8]]s when a battle starts, preventing Merlin from casting any skills. Any skills Merlin would've cast when a battle starts are triggered after silence ends, at which point Cyran loses [[5%]] of his current HP. If Merlin is absent on the enemy side, Cyran permanently increases his ATK by [[10%]].
Increases dark flame damage to [[50%]]<ATK>.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, casting an Ultimate increases damage dealt by [[8%]] for the next [[8]]s. Unstackable. The first Ultimate cast also permanently increases Energy recovery from attacking by [[8%]].
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Haste, 25 Execution.

d: Gains extra [[200]] Initial Energy.
